suppressions.justification: Message Oriented Middleware integration tests often require delays to wait for messages to reach the queue or stream
Test dispose methods use catch-all for double-dispose safety and cleanup resilience
Connection retry loop intentionally catches and logs failures before retrying
DLQ rejection catch blocks intentionally log and acknowledge offset to prevent reprocessing loops (ADR 0034)
ReceiptHandleIsInvalidException catch blocks intentionally catch and log invalid receipt handle errors to prevent dispatcher crash (GitHub issue #4031)
